name: com.pulsemcp/slack
description: MCP server for Slack — read/write messages, manage threads, and react to messages.

environmentVariables.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Slack Bot User OAuth Token starting with xoxb-.

environmentVariables.name: ENABLED_TOOLGROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tool groups to enable (readonly, write).
